## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Newo (AI employee platform) and GrowthX Labs (AI-assisted content creation service)](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Newo offers AI employees for businesses, specializing in lead conversion and appointment booking](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs provides high-quality, AI-assisted content creation services, focusing on SEO and programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Potential collaboration to enhance Newo's marketing efforts, particularly in creating targeted landing pages and partner-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs pricing starts at $9,000/month for 25 articles, with programmatic options at $12,000/month for 100 pages](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

## Topics

### Newo's AI Employee Platform

  - [Platform for businesses to hire AI employees for tasks like phone calls, text messages, and multichannel communication](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Focuses on lead conversion and appointment booking for industries like restaurants, dental offices, and home services](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Highly customizable agents with powerful tools and integrations](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Founded by Pavel, co-founder of Dialogflow (acquired by Google)](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workloads to make human editors and writers 10-20x more productive](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [250-step process from conceptualization to final output](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Incorporates company information, brand documents, and product details](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Utilizes multiple workflows for research, title generation, content briefs, and more](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Integrates data from SEMrush and Ahrefs APIs for keyword optimization](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Produces high-quality, well-researched content with proper citations and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Creating landing pages for Newo's partner types (e.g., web developers, marketing agencies)](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Developing industry-specific content for Newo's target customers (e.g., wellness, cleaning companies)](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Enhancing ad campaigns and webinar content](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Improving overall marketing messaging and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Engagement Terms and Pricing

  - [90-day initial period for testing the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000/month for 25 articles (5 per week)](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Programmatic content option at $12,000/month for 100 pages](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Two-week lead time for starting new engagements due to current bookings](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Additional Discussion Points

  - [Pavel's background with Dialogflow and Google Cloud AI incubator](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Bruno's experience owning restaurants and potential for using Newo's services](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Amusing anecdote about AI assistants potentially talking to each other](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send SOW (Statement of Work) and add Newo team to Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Newo to review proposal and consider budget allocation for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Potential team dinner at Bruno's restaurant when GrowthX team visits San Francisco in May](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Pavel to host GrowthX team if they visit his restaurant during their trip](https://fathom.video/share/912PZuBrcxwy9mvTutLAXB_quJV1xGM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
